content: Most existing Self-Refine frameworks treat LLM self-refinement as a single-perspective iterative polishing process, but integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms can unlock stronger, training-free refinement capability. This creates a new hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional supervised data or training, while addressing its common limitation of getting stuck in local optimal blind spots.
